name: @ifc-lite/wasm-threaded
_intent: INTENTIONALLY workspace-only / non-publishable. The threaded WASM bundle ships only inside the viewer app and is loaded behind the localStorage['ifc-lite:single-controller'] feature flag. Per the post-mortem in docs/architecture/single-controller-rayon-design.md §12, in-WASM threading regressed wall-clock for IFC parsing workloads, so this stays as opt-in latent infrastructure rather than a published artifact. Marking private removes it from the npm publish surface; bundlers consuming it must do so via workspace path resolution.
description: Thread-enabled WebAssembly bindings for IFC-Lite (uses wasm-bindgen-rayon for in-WASM parallelism). Requires cross-origin isolation (COOP/COEP). Generated by `THREADED=1 scripts/build-wasm.sh`.
